name: Shopify Order → Google Sheet row + Slack notification

business_intent.business_goal: Record every new Shopify order in a central Google Sheet and notify the sales team in Slack.
business_intent.desired_outcome: Each new Shopify order creates a new row in the designated Google Sheet and a message is posted to #sales. If the sheet write ultimately fails, the team is notified in Slack.

systems.name: Google Sheets
systems.role: destination datastore (append one row per order)

process_steps.action: Receive new order event from Shopify and extract order payload.
Map/extract required order fields to the Google Sheet row schema (columns).
Append a row to the configured Google Sheet with mapped order data.
Post a message to Slack #sales with order summary for every order (must run on every order).
If the sheet write fails, retry the write action up to 2 additional times (total 3 attempts).
If all retries fail, post a failure alert to Slack #sales with failure details and order reference.

business_rules.description: Post to Slack #sales for every new Shopify order, regardless of sheet write success or failure (success posts and failure alert posts after retries exhausted).

exception_rules.scenario: Google Sheet append fails after configured retries are exhausted.
exception_rules.behavior: Send failure notification to Slack #sales with order ID and error details; do not perform human approval or block further processing of new orders.

retry_requirements.after_final_failure: Send Slack notification to #sales with order identifier and failure details.

notification_rules.condition: When Google Sheets write has failed and retries exhausted

unknown_requirements.reason: Specific Shopify order fields (columns) to write into the Google Sheet are not specified (which order properties should be stored as sheet columns).
Target Google Sheet file, worksheet name/tab, and exact cell/column mapping are not provided.
